REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT OCWEN LOAN SERVICING, LLC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 3, 2015. MOVING PARTY IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.6B AND PROVIDE COURTESY COPY OF THE OPERATIVE COMPLAINT TO DEPARTMENT 501 NO LATER THAN AUGUST 14, 2015 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING NEW HEARING DATE. OPPOSING PARTY IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.6B AND PROVIDE COURTESY COPY OF OPPOSITION TO DEPARTMENT 501 NO LATER THAN AUGUST 14, 2015 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED.

ALLEGATIONS IN THE COMPLAINT MUST BE TAKEN AS TRUE FOR THE PURPOSES OF DEMURRER. PLAINTIFF SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES BREACH OF CONTRACT, THE SPECIFIC AMOUNT OF MONETARY LOSS, ECONOMIC INJURY AND DUTY OR CARE UNDER BIAKANJA FACTORS. MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-19-2016 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2015 Continued To Nov-04-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-03-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT OCWEN LOAN SERVICING, LLC's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Allegations in the complaint must be taken as true for the purposes of demurrer. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges breach of contract, the specific amount of monetary loss, economic injury and duty or care under Biakanja factors. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-04-2015 Continued To Sep-03-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT OCWEN LOAN SERVICING, LLC's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to September 3, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to department 501 no later than August 14, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than August 14, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
